productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Stormlock selected-payoff line handoff
lastRefinementUnit.result: Stormlock now spends the final 12 confirmation frames growing the existing consequence line into the selected existing payoff target while easing that target into the camera composition before input returns.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Stormlock payoff-line handoff feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: The final 12 confirmation frames now connect Stormlock to the selected Slipstream or Cacheline target with the existing consequence line, target entity, route-choice state, and camera before the original payoff opens.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed the actual safe route through the exact handoff boundary and one original payoff event, preserved the 134-speed Windglass score, proved real failure and keyboard retry, checked Advanced closed/open/closed, held bounded DOM/canvas/descriptor/scene/heap behavior, and reported zero console messages. Human View passed the first screen, final safe line handoff, and opened Slipstream payoff with diagnostics closed. Matched isolated active-play performance changed from 27.56 to 27.22 FPS (-1.23 percent), p95 changed from 50.6 to 51.0 ms, and steady-state counts did not grow.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments publication pending; ProtoKits is unchanged at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Carry the selected mint or amber handoff color through the first payoff grapple fire as one brief cable-and-impact surge, deriving it from existing payoff and grapple feedback without adding a cable, event, effect pool, or state owner.
